findings.text: OCR extracted a Notice to Quit dated 20 April 2026 from Edinburgh Napier University to Anfal Elbushra (student number 40805511).
The notice states the tenancy is terminated for breach of Clause 2, but the effective termination date is garbled ('as at 1.').
OCR confidence is low (0.65) with multiple transcription errors: garbled addresses, misspelled names, truncated clauses, and missing dates. Not reliable for precise legal facts.

Tesseract OCR produced low-quality output from a WhatsApp image. Re-extraction with a higher-quality OCR engine or human transcription is recommended before relying on specific dates, amounts, or legal terms.

proposed_artifacts.content: Request human operator to review the original WhatsApp image (NAP-SRC-0020.jpeg) and produce a verified transcription. Key areas to correct: (1) full address of Castlelaw House, (2) exact termination date after 'as at', (3) full title of Brydon Connolly, (4) any enclosure or attachment references, (5) correct spelling of 'Accommodation' and other garbled words. Once verified, re-import as a new artifact with confidence 1.0.
proposed_artifacts.title: NAP-SRC-0020 human-verified transcription

proposed_tasks.instructions: Review the original WhatsApp image (NAP-SRC-0020.jpeg) and the current OCR output. Produce a corrected, human-verified transcription. Pay special attention to: (1) the full address of Castlelaw House, (2) the exact termination date, (3) the full title and signature block of Brydon Connolly, (4) any enclosures or attachments, (5) correct spelling of all words. Output the verified text as a new artifact.
proposed_tasks.title: Human verification of NAP-SRC-0020 OCR

risk_flags.description: Low OCR confidence (0.65) and garbled text make the extracted evidence unreliable for precise legal facts, dates, or amounts.
The termination date is incomplete; the notice may be invalid or unenforceable without a clear effective date.
Re-extraction or human transcription is needed before the document can be used for legal analysis or filing.

summary: OCR of NAP-SRC-0020 (WhatsApp image of a Notice to Quit from Edinburgh Napier University to Anfal Elbushra) has low confidence (0.65) and contains multiple transcription errors: garbled addresses, misspelled names, truncated legal clauses, and missing dates. The document appears to be a formal notice terminating a tenancy for breach of Clause 2. The extracted text is usable for broad context but unreliable for precise facts, dates, or legal terms without human review or re-extraction.

uncertainties.reason: The effective termination date is truncated to 'as at 1.'; the full date is missing.
The extracted text contains garbled address lines and misspelled words (e.g., 'Accommogaton', 'Sghi Camgs', 'Sioniin ceir') that cannot be reliably corrected without the original image.
The sender's title is truncated to 'Student Accommod.'; the full title and any enclosure references are missing.
